Describe the visual elements and text displayed during the introduction and title sequence of the video.
canonical_answer: An orange cartoon bunny wearing a teal beret holds a dark pencil and paintbrush next to text reading 'bunny + me show' inside a pink rectangle. A male anime character in a pinkish-red outfit and a female character in a blue top appear against a light wood grain texture. Large blue letters spell 'How to Draw HANDS' while an orange box labels the segment as a 'BASIC TUTORIAL'. Red circles highlight the characters' hip and waist areas respectively.

question: Describe the visual sequence occurring from the start of the video until the hand gestures appear.
canonical_answer: At 0s, an orange cartoon bunny wearing a teal beret is displayed against a mint green background; at 2s, the text 'bunny + me show' appears clearly legible; at 4s, four hands position themselves around the wooden table edges; at 5s, one hand extends specific fingers while others remain still.

question: Describe the key visual elements and text overlays shown when the anime characters are on screen.
canonical_answer: At 8s, two anime characters appear on a wood grain background; at 9s, a text bubble points to the male character's outfit; at 10s, red circles highlight the male character's pockets; at 14s, the title 'How to Draw HANDS' appears in large blue letters.
